Notice Of Hearing Of Claimant Electronic Payment Providers, Incs Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-21-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jeffrey Singletary, Esq. (714-427-7473) for Petitioner/Moving party PETITIONER/CLAIMANT ELECTRONIC PAYMENT PROVIDERS INC.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER/CLAIMANT ELECTRONIC PAYMENT PROVIDERS INC. DBA BILLING TREE'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. (as fully reported on the reporter's notes) Moving party to submit a form of proposed order and proposed judgment. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: M.
